creator: yonas.yanfa@gmail.com
text:
1. Nothing exists at https://github.com/Dreamacro/clash
2. 6 years old code exists at https://github.com/fossabot/clash

I have code that goes back 9 months: https://github.com/yonasBSD/clash

Should I take over the project? This is a Chinese censorship related project, so people using it might really depend on it - i.e. not to be taken lightly.

Perhaps we should create an Internet Censorship Working Group and donate the code the them.


Related articles:

"Anti-censorship tools are quietly disappearing into thin air in China"

Clash, the popular proxy client, is the latest victim in the country's crackdown on the open internet

-- https://techcrunch.com/2023/11/21/china-censorship-circumvention-tools-clash-disappear


Any suggestions welcome.
